sizing_rule.note: Position size scales inversely to volatility: multiply by 1.33x for low-volatility instruments (≤0.57 percentile) and 0.67x for high-volatility instruments (≥1.75 percentile). Rebalance every 10 days based on 20-day rolling volatility normalized across portfolio.

source_rule_text: A trader should adjust position size based on the relative risk and volatility characteristics of each instrument, rather than treating all investment units identically regardless of their inherent risk profile.
